project_info.name: PDS Gestión Integral
project_info.logo_specs: Red background (#E63946) with lowercase white text 'pds' featuring a stylized smile.

theme_and_archetype.rationale: For an ERP/Dashboard with high data density, the Swiss archetype provides authority, clarity, and a function-first approach. We mix it with the brand red for primary actions, keeping the rest monochrome to reduce cognitive load.

headings.scale_rules: Max text-4xl for main dashboard headers. Tightly tracked (tracking-tight) for large sizes. Avoid generic sans-serifs.

body.scale_rules: text-sm to text-base for standard data, ensuring high legibility in dense tables.

labels.style: Uppercase, tiny (text-xs), wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]), bold weight.

grid_system.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children. No jagged bottoms. Dense layout for data correlation.

spacing_scale.internal_padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards/containers to prevent text collision.
spacing_scale.section_spacing: py-8 or py-12 for distinct layout blocks.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels, and tables. Optical alignment for icons inside buttons.

component_strategy.surfaces: Grid Borders and Flat Technical Look. 1px border-border, no shadow. Hover states add slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
component_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle rounded-md. High contrast. Hover state must explicitly set background and text color.
component_strategy.navigation: Sticky Header with Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border). DO NOT use completely transparent headers.
component_strategy.inputs_forms: Shadcn based. Never use native inputs. Solid white backgrounds with 1px border.
component_strategy.tables: Dense, striped rows or solid borders. IBM Plex Sans for tabular numbers.
component_strategy.modals: Backdrop blur on overlay (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm). Solid white container, p-6.

interactive_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons hover to darker primary hue. Table rows hover to muted background.
interactive_and_motion.focus_states: High contrast ring matching primary color (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary).
interactive_and_motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. No 'all' transitions.

media_and_icons.icon_rationale: Best for dense dashboards and developer tools, offering a clean, technical look.

images.description: Modern, clean dentist clinic with white ceramic sinks and bright lighting.
Flat lay of medical supplies, clean and organized, perfect for empty inventory states.

media_and_icons.image_overlays: Max bg-black/50 for dark overlay or bg-white/40 for light overlay over images to maintain text contrast.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use Text Shadow over images if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='submit-login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Work Sans for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement a 'Control Room' dense grid for the dashboard. Use flat, white Shadcn cards with 1px borders, avoiding heavy shadows.
Update the Tailwind CSS variables in src/index.css to match the CSS variables provided in this JSON.
Build the navigation as a sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl).
Ensure all interactive elements have a data-testid attribute.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. Do NOT use Teal colors.
Ensure the login screen or non-dashboard views utilize the provided dentist clinic image as a background with a clean white/glassmorphic form.
